title: Something Happened | #shorts
full_text: All right. So, something happened and I want you to know that it's not my fault. I was just walking out in a new city. I'm here for a show tonight and I was trying to get some sun. You see this vitamin? I was just trying to get some vitamin D and then I was standing outside the store just getting air and a bag threw itself at me. It literally landed on my head. I don't know who who put it out there from which window and how it landed. Then another bag threw itself at me and then before I could say anything, a shoe threw it itself at me. You see the boxes over here? I went in, I was like, you know what? What am I supposed to do? Not take the things because you have some twisted sense of like consumerism and luxury branding and all that. No, thank you. I don't need to subscribe to your ideas. And also, I ended up paying for those things cuz it didn't feel right. And just so you know, I'm in Canada and the Canadian dollar is is very favorable. I did the math. And so, not only did I do the right thing, but it was also the financially better decision to make. So that
